title: Deep Character Concept Breakdown Board AI
sourceTitle: Deep Character Concept Breakdown Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Horizontal panoramic deep character concept breakdown board for adult forest messenger in misty mythic woodland city. Subject: adult forest messenger appears as the central full-body concept figure, surrounded by face, costume, props, color script, backstory notes that explain costume layers, expressions, materials, carried objects, weapon or tool display, and life-detail props. Scene: Professional game and anime concept-design presentation board on beige parchment or light gray textured paper, with organized handwritten annotations, leader lines, magnified material details, and coherent worldbuilding atmosphere from misty mythic woodland city. Composition: Fixed wide panoramic design sheet: largest central full-body character pose, structured surrounding breakdown zones, layered outfit display, three to four expression heads, material closeups, opened bag or carried-object spread, horizontal weapon or tool showcase, small lifestyle props, and clean guide-line annotations. Signature Elements: Central full-body adult forest messenger, misty mythic woodland city, face, costume, props, color script, backstory notes, outfit layering, expression set, material closeups, opened bag contents, personal objects, horizontal weapon or tool display, handwritten notes, and a coherent character-life logic system. Style: World-class character concept art breakdown with pixel-level structural logic, believable material rendering, professional proportions, unified light direction, lived-in object reasoning, hand-drawn note texture, and polished production-art board finish. Color Palette: Warm parchment beige or soft light gray base, muted concept-art neutrals, material-accurate accent colors from the character design, dark annotation ink, and restrained highlight swatches. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Detailed fabric, leather, metal, ornaments, accessories, bag contents, non-explicit inner clothing construction, tools or weapons, handwritten paper texture, and precise callout lines. Typography: Handwritten-style annotation labels identify costume layers, expression logic, materials, objects, props, and story notes while staying readable and integrated into the concept board. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
